name: SOAP Hello Service
description: A simple SOAP mock service with a HelloWorld operation. Good for testing SOAP client setup and WS-Security headers.
note: For SOAP mocks on MockHub, upload the WSDL file at the URL above. The JSON below documents the expected request/response structure.

mock_response.envelope:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soapenv:Body>
    <SayHelloResponse>
      <message>Hello, World! Request ID: {{uuid}}, Time: {{isodate}}</message>
    </SayHelloResponse>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

input.description: Simulates a SOAP Fault when an invalid name is provided

mock_response.envelope:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soapenv:Body>
    <soapenv:Fault>
      <faultcode>soapenv:Client</faultcode>
      <faultstring>Invalid input: name cannot be empty</faultstring>
      <detail>
        <errorCode>INVALID_INPUT</errorCode>
        <timestamp>{{isodate}}</timestamp>
      </detail>
    </soapenv:Fault>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
